name: Reborn Origins
summary: Reborn might originate from circumstances similar to those of various undead or constructs. The Reborn Origins table provides suggestions for how your character became reborn.
bonuses: Reborn might originate from circumstances similar to those of various undead or constructs. The Reborn Origins table provides suggestions for how your character became reborn.
1You were magically resurrected but something went wrong.
2Stitches bind your body’s mismatched pieces, and your memories come from multiple different lives.
3After clawing free from your grave, you realized you have no memories except for a single name.
